Increases outgoing damage by **20%**. Dying permanently disables this Neutral Item and the current Enchantment is lost.
lore: So magnificent, it cannot abide failure.

name: item_divine_regalia_broken
description:
# Passive: Fallen
You have died and thus get nothing.
lore: It cannot abide failure.

name: item_furion_gold_bag
description: Contains gold

name: item_weighted_dice
description:
# Passive: Loaded
Increases your base damage maximum by **6**. When calculating your base damage or creep bounty from last hits, the value is computed **2** times and the highest value is taken.

name: item_ash_legion_shield
description:
# Active: Shield Wall
Reduce your own movement speed by **20** to provide a **160** physical damage barrier to allied player controlled units in a **800** unit radius. Lasts for **6** seconds.

name: item_riftshadow_prism
description:
# Active: Refract
Spend **8%** of your current life total to create a full health illusion that lasts for 20 seconds. The illusion has **50%** outgoing damage and takes **200%** of incoming damage.

name: item_metamorphic_mandible
description:
# Active: Pupate
Enter into an insect form for **5** seconds, increasing magic resistance by **50%** and movement speed by **20%**. While an insect, your size is decreased and your armor is reduced by **45%**.

name: item_idol_of_screeauk
description:
# Active: False Flight
Gain **50%** slow resistance, phased movement, and **25%** evasion for **6.5** seconds.

name: item_flayers_bota
description:
# Active: Bloodthirst
Gain **15%** base damage and **30** attack speed for **6** seconds.


# Passive: Bloodrush
Enemy heroes dying within **1200** units reset the cooldown of Bloodthirst.

name: item_tiara_of_selemene
lore: A symbol of favor bestowed upon the high priestess of Selemene.

name: item_doubloon
description:
# Toggle: Flip
Toggle to convert **30%** of your Max Health to Max Mana, or **30%** of your Max Mana to Max Health.

name: item_roshans_banner
description:
# Use: Place Banner
Creates a banner at the target location. Lane creeps in the area of effect become damage immune while the Banner is up. Lasts **120** seconds.

 Can be destroyed. Melee hero attacks deal 2x damage to the banner.

name: item_devastator
description:
# Passive: Witch Blade
Causes your next attack to have true strike, apply a poison for **4** seconds, slowing by **25%** and dealing **0.75**x your intelligence as damage every second.


# Passive: Magic Corruption
Your attacks reduce the enemy's Magic resistance by **20%** for **4** seconds.
lore: Warning: There is no antidote if picked up by the wrong end.

name: item_angels_demise
description:
# Passive: Empower Spell
The next Unit Target spell you cast on an enemy deals a separate **250** additional damage, disables their passives, and slows their movement speed by **30%** for **4**s.
lore: A blade sharp enough to slice through magic itself.

name: item_eldwurms_edda
description:
# Passive: Forbidden Knowledge
When consumed, increases Winter Wyvern's base intelligence by **25%** of its current value at the time of consumption, and increases the current and maximum level of a basic ability by one. All values except for Mana Cost scale by 50% of the difference between their existing levels for the additional level

name: item_essence_distiller
description:
# Active: Soul Release
Provides **40** health regeneration when cast on allies.

Can be ground targeted to lie dormant for up to **15**s and attach to the first enemy that comes within **400** radius. When on enemies, deals **25** damage per second and provides True Sight over them and shares their vision with the wearer's team.

Lasts **8** seconds.

Gains charges every time an enemy hero dies within **1500** units.

name: item_consecrated_wraps
description:
# Passive: Hallowed
Gain a charge every **3**s, up to a maximum of %AbilityCharges% charges. Upon gaining a charge, your movement speed is increased by **15%** for **5**s.

Whenever you take damage from a player-controlled unit or Roshan, consume all charges to gain an all damage barrier for **5**s that absorbs **120** damage per charge (**360** max).

name: item_crellas_crozier
description:
# Active: Rite of Rumusque
You enter ghost form for **4** seconds, becoming immune to physical damage, but are unable to attack and **-30%** more vulnerable to magic damage.

Steal **5%** movement speed from enemy heroes in **900** range every second. Movement speed steal lasts **1.5**s.

Putrefaction Aura's effect is increased to **75%**. All of the lost Health Restoration is redirected to you every second.


# Passive: Putrefaction Aura
Reduces nearby enemy heroes' Health Restoration by **30%**.

Radius: **900**

name: item_hydras_breath
description:
# Passive: Miasma
Attacks poison enemies, dealing **2.5%** of the target's Max HP as Magical Damage per second for **3** seconds.


# Passive: Polycephaly
Ranged attacks have a **30%** chance to fire additional projectiles at up to **3** nearby enemies with **150** extra range and within a **120** degree angle in front of the attacker. The additional projectiles deal **20** + **75%** damage of a normal attack and do not trigger on hit effects except for Miasma. The primary attack deals **20** + **100%** damage of a normal attack.

name: item_spellslinger
description:
# Passive: Salvo
**20%** of the mana used to cast abilities is recovered over **10** seconds.

name: item_prophets_pendulum
description:
# Passive: Linger
**30%** of incoming damage is delayed over **5** seconds.

name: item_stonefeather_satchel
description:
# Toggle: Transmogrify
Toggle to switch the contents of the Satchel between a pound of Feathers or Rocks.

**Feathers:** increase movement speed by **12** and distance of forced movement effects applied to the wearer by **30%**.

**Rocks:** increase armor by **3** and decrease the distance of forced movement effects applied to the wearer by **30%**.

name: item_enchanters_bauble
description:
# Passive: Enchant
Increases the bonuses of the item's Neutral Enchantment by **10%**. Every time this item is crafted again the bonus is increased by **40%**.

name: item_harmonizer
description:
# Passive: Balance
Gain **5%** spell manacost reduction for every spell off cooldown and **6%** spell amplification for every spell on cooldown.

name: item_conjurers_catalyst
description:
# Passive: Spellover
Dealing **200** spell damage to an enemy causes them to overheat and deal damage to their allies in a **300** unit radius. Hero targets deal **80** damage to their allies, other targets deal **30** damage.

name: item_foragers_kit
description:
# Passive: Forage
When the cooldown is ready, nearby trees that can be foraged will appear. By standing next to a tree for **1**s, you can forage the tree and find flora, fungi or a bag of gold containing **30** gold.

name: item_foragers_health
description:
# Use: Munch
Grants **1%** max health regeneration to the target for **10** seconds.

If the unit is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan, the effect is lost.

name: item_foragers_stats
description:
# Use: Munch
Grants **1** permanent primary attribute.

name: item_foragers_mana
description:
# Use: Munch
Instantly restores **50** mana + **5%** of the target's max mana when consumed

name: item_partisans_brand
description:
# Passive: Brand
Increases spell damage dealt to player controlled units by **9%**.

name: item_tidehunter_fish
description: Yummy Fish

description: Activate to redeem a Tier 1 Neutral Item. The resulting neutral item isn't shareable and a hero can only redeem a single token per tier.

name: item_vindicators_axe
description:
# Passive: Vengeance
Provides **30** damage if equipped hero is Silenced and **20** armor if equipped hero is Stunned.

name: item_duelist_gloves
description:
# Passive: Boldness
Grants **20** attack speed as long as there are enemy heroes within **1200** units.

name: item_dandelion_amulet
description:
# Passive: Magical Damage Block
Every **12**s, blocks up to **300** magic damage from damage instances over **75** damage.

name: item_martyrs_plate
description:
# Active: Martyrdom
Redirect **25%** of all magic damage dealt to your allied heroes within **900** radius towards you for **10** seconds.

name: item_gossamer_cape
description:
# Passive: Sixth Sense
Automatically dodge an attack from an enemy hero.

name: item_famango
description:
# Use: Eat Lotus
Instantly restores **125** health and mana.

name: item_great_famango
description:
# Use: Eat Lotus
Instantly restores **400** health and mana.

name: item_greater_famango
description:
# Use: Eat Lotus
Instantly restores **900** health and mana.

name: item_ofrenda
description:
# Active: Honor the Dead
Place this Offering on an Altar to honor the dead with a memory from those they left behind.
lore: Take joy in remembering those beloved who've passed now beyond the veil.

name: item_ofrenda_shovel
description:
# Active: Dig
Search the map for Offerings to the dead.
lore: You don't know where it came from, but it knows where you need to go. All you need to do is dig.

name: item_ofrenda_pledge
description:
# Active: Undying Promise
Signal to the spirits of the other realm your commitment to honoring them. If everyone in the battle makes an Undying Promise before the fight begins, the dead might be willing to listen.
lore: This item seems unstable. Like it might just disappear.
